summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FEC Revenue Engine feature (iteration 13). All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. FEC-specific wizard with 4 steps (Locatie, Zones, Attracties, Revenue) working correctly. 14 FEC products across 5 categories, 5 FEC suppliers, revenue calculation engine with ROI/break-even, Top 5 per m² ranking, and rule-based AI advisor all functional. Recreatie/Chalet flows remain unaffected.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/fec/products returns 200
Backend: GET /api/fec/products returns 14 FEC products
Backend: FEC products have required fields (revenue_per_hour, footprint_m2, roi_months)
Backend: FEC products span 5 categories (arcade, karting, interactive, indoor_play, horeca)
Backend: GET /api/fec/top5 returns 200
Backend: GET /api/fec/top5 returns 5 products
Backend: Top5 sorted by revenue_per_m2 descending
Backend: Top5 has required fields
Backend: GET /api/fec/zone-types returns 200
Backend: Zone-types returns 7 zone types
Backend: Zone-types have required fields (id, name, color, min_m2, revenue_factor)
Backend: GET /api/fec/suppliers returns 200
Backend: Suppliers returns 5 FEC suppliers (X-Wall, Shuffly, Heemskerk Play, Pro Karting, Time Mission)
Backend: Suppliers have required fields
Backend: POST /api/fec/calculate-revenue returns 200
Backend: Calculate-revenue response has required fields (total_investment, total_monthly_revenue, break_even_months, top_performers, suggestions)
Backend: Revenue calculation correct for single product
Backend: Revenue calculation correct for multiple products with quantities
Backend: Calculate-revenue returns AI suggestions
Backend: Top performers sorted by monthly_revenue
Backend: Recreatie products endpoint still works
Backend: Recreatie flow filter works
Backend: Chalet flow filter works
Backend: Projects CRUD still works
Backend: AI recommendations endpoint still works
Frontend: Flow Selector page loads with 3 flow buttons
Frontend: RECRA logo visible in Flow Selector header
Frontend: Clicking 'FEC & Experience' opens FecWizard (not regular configurator)
Frontend: FEC header shows 'FEC & Experience' label
Frontend: FEC header shows 'Revenue Engine' badge
Frontend: RECRA logo visible in FEC header (back button)
Frontend: All 4 FEC steps present (Locatie, Zones, Attracties, Revenue)
Frontend: Step 1 has total_area_m2, ceiling_height_m, target_audience, operating_hours/days inputs
Frontend: Step 1 inputs accept values correctly
Frontend: Step 2 shows zone type buttons (entree, arcade, karting, interactive, indoor_play, horeca, routing)
Frontend: Step 2 zones can be added
Frontend: Step 2 zone visualization bar visible
Frontend: Step 2 zones appear on canvas with colors
Frontend: Step 3 shows Top 5 per m² revenue section
Frontend: Step 3 shows all products with add/remove buttons
Frontend: Step 3 category filter works
Frontend: Adding products updates Business Case sidebar
Frontend: Step 4 Revenue Dashboard shows key metrics (investment, omzet/mnd, break-even, €/m²)
Frontend: Step 4 shows top performers
Frontend: Step 4 shows AI suggestions
Frontend: Step 4 shows cross-sell links (Recreatie, Chalet)
Frontend: Back button returns to Flow Selector
Frontend: Recreatie flow opens regular 5-step configurator
Frontend: Chalet flow opens regular 5-step configurator
Frontend: Active flow label shows correctly for each flow
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - FEC products/suppliers defined in fec_engine.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 added FEC Revenue Engine - a completely separate wizard for Fun & Entertainment Centers. Key components: 1) FecWizard.jsx - 4-step wizard (Locatie, Zones, Attracties, Revenue) with its own state management. 2) fec_engine.py - 14 FEC products across 5 categories (arcade, karting, interactive, indoor_play, horeca), 5 FEC suppliers (X-Wall, Shuffly, Heemskerk Play, Pro Karting, Time Mission), revenue calculation engine, AI rules. 3) FEC routes registered in server.py with prefix '/api'. 4) App.js routes 'fec' flow to FecWizard instead of regular configurator. 5) Revenue calculation: investment = price_purchase + installation_cost, monthly_revenue = revenue_per_hour * operating_hours * operating_days, break_even = investment / monthly_revenue. 6) Top 5 sorted by revenue_per_m2 (monthly_revenue / footprint_m2). 7) AI suggestions include: no horeca warning, karting optimization, low capacity warning, interactive suggestion, ceiling height check, remaining space suggestion, entree zone suggestion, cross-sell recreatie. 8) All data-testid attributes present for testing: fec-step-1/2/3/4, fec-area-input, fec-ceiling-input, fec-audience-select, fec-hours-input, fec-days-input, add-zone-*, fec-product-*, top5-*, fec-total-investment, fec-monthly-revenue, fec-breakeven, fec-rev-per-m2, fec-suggestion-*, fec-crosssell-*.
